evals.prompt: I just put my paper on arXiv. Can you turn the LaTeX source into an interactive, explorable project homepage I can host on GitHub Pages?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-paper-2-web in the Paper2Web path: runs the Paper2All pipeline (pipeline_all.py with --model-choice 1) on the LaTeX source to produce a layout-aware, responsive interactive homepage with interactive figures/tables/citations and navigation, outputs index.html/styles.css/assets, and notes GitHub Pages as a deployment target.

evals.prompt: I want a narrated presentation video — slides with voiceover and synced cursor highlights — generated from my paper for a journal video abstract. Talking-head optional.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-paper-2-web in the Paper2Video path: uses the video pipeline (pipeline_light.py in the separate p2v env) to auto-generate slides from the paper structure, natural speech narration, synchronized cursor movements/highlights, with optional Hallo2 talking-head via pipeline.py (noting GPU requirement), producing final_video.mp4 plus slides/audio/subtitles.

evals.prompt: Generate a print-ready 60x40 inch conference poster directly from my PDF paper, with a QR code linking to the paper and our lab logo.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-paper-2-web in the Paper2Poster path: runs pipeline_all.py with --model-choice 2 and custom --poster-width-inches/--poster-height-inches (60x40), produces a high-resolution (300+ DPI) print-ready poster_final.pdf/png with professional layout. May note that the QR code and lab-logo branding are not first-class documented flags and could need manual addition.

evals.prompt: My paper got accepted at a conference. I want the complete promotional package — website, poster, and presentation video — all generated from the same LaTeX source.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-paper-2-web to generate the full package: pipeline_all.py without --model-choice (or run per-component) for the website and poster, plus the separate video pipeline (pipeline_light.py in the p2v env). Organizes outputs per component (website/, poster/, video/), and may advise the priority order (website fastest, then poster, then video) for a tight deadline.

assertions.value: Generates all three Paper2All components (website, poster, and video) from one source rather than just one.

evals.prompt: I want to hand-build a conference poster in LaTeX myself using beamerposter — give me the template and help me lay out the columns and figures. I'm not converting a finished paper through an automated pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-latex-posters. The user wants to author a LaTeX poster by hand with beamerposter and manual layout control, not run the automated Paper2All Paper2Poster pipeline that transforms an existing paper.

evals.prompt: I need to build a 15-slide conference talk deck from scratch about my project — well-designed slides I can present live and edit, not an auto-narrated video.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-scientific-slides. The user wants an editable presentation slide deck authored for live delivery, not a Paper2Video auto-narrated presentation video generated from a paper.
